name: zsnd_set_use_archive_banks_flag
description: zSnd::SetUseArchiveBanksFlag writes the archive-bank usage selector global.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 7 bytes and the VC object body is 16 bytes with 9 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies that zSnd::SetUseArchiveBanksFlag writes g_zSnd_UseArchiveBanksFlag for enabled and disabled states.
